home.title: How To Immigrate
home.subtitle: Compare immigration criteria, explore the interactive map, and plan your custom roadmap.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.successRegister: Account created successfully! Please sign in.

onboarding.title: Setting Up Your Immigration Profile
onboarding.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions to personalize your recommendations and roadmaps.
onboarding.step1Desc: Enter your age and current nationality.
onboarding.step2Desc: What is your education level and current profession?
onboarding.step4Desc: What is your primary goal for immigrating?
onboarding.step5Desc: Select the financial budget available for your plan.
onboarding.resumeMessage: We resumed your progress from the last saved step!

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.profileNotDone: Please complete your onboarding to see personalized recommendations.
dashboard.recommendedCountriesDesc: Best options based on your profile and goals.
dashboard.myFavoritesDesc: Quick access to the countries you saved.
dashboard.noFavorites: You haven't favorited any countries yet.
dashboard.noRoadmaps: No active roadmaps. Visit a country page to start planning.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details, export your data, or delete your account.
profile.exportDataDesc: Download all your data collected by the platform in compliance with LGPD/GDPR.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: This action is irreversible and will permanently delete all your data.
profile.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account and all associated information? This action cannot be undone.

map.title: Interactive Immigration Map
map.noCountries: No countries match the selected filters.
